# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - deploy

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying changes..."
    - |
      if [[ $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == 'merge_request_event' ]]; then
        echo "This is a merge request, using MR title for deployment tag"
        export DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -e 's/[^a-z0-9 ]//g' | sed -E 's/ +/-/g')
      else
        echo "This is not a merge request, using default deployment tag"
        export DEPLOYMENT_WHATEVER="default"
      fi
    - echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
  only:
    - master
